input.prompt: Black and white hand-drawn pencil storyboard sheet, classic film director storyboard, rough graphite sketch on clean white paper, 4 cinematic panels in a 2-column by 2-row grid, each panel a rectangular framed shot with a small hand-drawn number badge (28,29,30,31) in the top-left corner, consistent loose sketch line style across all panels, soft hatching shading, no color, no text captions. Setting: offer and closing of an industrial manufacturing video. Panel 28, medium shot: a master holding out the first trial part toward the camera, offering it to the viewer. Panel 29, wide hero shot: a finished product in beautiful dramatic light, or a wide workshop view with workers in backlight. Panel 30, logo card: an abstract company logo assembling from defocus and glare on a clean empty background, placeholder logo mark. Panel 31, contacts card: a clean end-plate layout with placeholder lines for a website and phone number, minimal.
